title: Package visibility / access policy (v1alpha2)
description: Declares the distribution lane and access rule for a Registry package. TARGET-STATE contract. `public`/`community` are OSS: installable with NO Hub account and MUST be mirrorable. `verified-premium`/`private-organization` require a matching entitlement scope and are fetched via a short-lived download grant (see package-download-grant.schema.json) — NEVER DRM in the artifact. Carries NO secret values.

license.description: SPDX license of the pack CONTENT. Independent of NexusOS/Ironbat trademark rights.

commercial_terms_ref.description: Reference to external commercial terms when the pack is not purely OSS. Optional; never embeds the terms themselves.

required_entitlements.description: Capabilities the installing instance must hold to install/run the pack. MUST be non-empty for verified-premium/private-organization; MUST be empty/absent for public/community.

required_scopes.description: Registry scopes the entitlement must include (e.g. 'verified-premium:legal-vertical').

mirrorable.description: Whether third parties may mirror the artifact. MUST be true for public/community (OSS distribution).

requires_hub_account.description: Whether a Hub account is needed to obtain the artifact. MUST be false for public/community.

distribution.description: How the artifact is fetched. Restricted lanes use short_lived_grant; free lanes use direct_download.
